svg.text: Help veterans build legally-complete VA disability claims using the Caluza Triangle: Diagnosis + In-Service Event + Nexus
FTS5 trigger auto-indexes each page on insert
• 200+ VASRD codes mapped to keyword libraries
• Searches all FTS5-indexed pages for matches
• Returns PotentialClaim objects (Low / Medium / High confidence)
• BM25 ranked results with snippet highlighting
• Fallback to LIKE search on FTS5 syntax error
⚠ Negative C&P exam likely (nexus language unverified)
⚠ Wrong form submitted (e.g. TDIU without active diagnosis)
⚠ No continuity of treatment in records
VA whole-person method (not additive) · rounds to nearest 10%
Displayed on Dashboard · PACT Act eligibility banner auto-shown
• Copies evidence files to sorted folders
va_claims_manager · PyQt6 desktop app · SQLite + FTS5 · pdfplumber · Tesseract OCR
